title: Pseudosempervivum diversifolium

The classification of Pseudosempervivum diversifolium is further divided into species and subspecies levels. More research is required for a detailed classification of the plant. Pseudosempervivum diversifolium is closely related to other succulents found in the Crassulaceae family.
properties: Pseudosempervivum diversifolium is not a widely recognized or well-documented plant species.
